articles.title: Solana Active Addresses Drop 50% As Price Holds Strong: Why?
articles.description: The number of active addresses on the Solana (SOL) network has dropped significantly in recent months, despite an increase in Solana price. Market analyst Ali reported that active addresses fell from 18.5 million in October 2024 to 8.4 million in February 2025, marking a decline of over 50%. However, the price of SOL has risen […] The post Solana Active Addresses Drop 50% As Price Holds...

articles.title: Coinbase Launches Solana, Hedera Futures Contracts for US Traders
articles.description: Coinbase's derivatives arm said that it now offers CFTC-regulated futures contracts covering Solana and Hedera.

articles.title: ‘He signs whatever I say’: LIBRA token ‘facilitator’ Hayden Davis claims he paid Argentine Pres. Milei’s sister for influence: report
articles.description: The LIBRA token scandal has grabbed headlines since President Milei appeared to promote the token with a post to X.

articles.title: Milei’s meme coin advisor allegedly paid president’s sister, bragged to control him
articles.description: Hayden Davis, co-creator of the LIBRA memecoin and CEO of Kelsier Ventures, allegedly sent messages months before the token's collapse claiming he had control over Milei through payments to the president's sister, Karina Elizabeth Milei, according to a CoinDesk report."I send $$ to his sister and he signs whatever I say and does what I want," Davis allegedly wrote in messages reviewed by...

articles.title: Hayden Davis Opens Up After LIBRA Crypto Controversy: Confirms Involvement in MELANIA Coin Launch
articles.description: In a recent interview with Coffeezilla, cryptocurrency launch strategist Hayden Davis broke his silence on the controversial LIBRA crypto launch and confirmed his involvement in the MELANIA token project. Davis, who currently controls approximately $100 million in funds from the LIBRA crypto launch, shared details about the mechanics of high-profile meme coin launches, including project...

articles.title: LIBRA memecoin scandal dings Solana’s image, but here’s the real reason why SOL is down
articles.description: Solana price plummets as a drop in onchain activity, declining DApps TVL and looming SOL token unlocks approach.

articles.title: SEC acknowledges Bitwise Spot XRP ETF filing
articles.description: According to new reports, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has confirmed the receipt of an application for a Bitwise spot XRP Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF). According to earlier reports, Bitwise initially filed an application to launch the product back in early October. The acknowledgment follows last week’s XRP ETF filings wins submitted by Grayscale […]

articles.title: SEC acknowledges spot XRP ETF filing from Bitwise
articles.description: The SEC previously acknowledged spot XRP ETF filings from 21Shares and Grayscale, though not from Canary Capital and WisdomTree.

articles.title: SEC Acknowledges Filing for Bitwise Spot XRP ETF on February 18, 2025, $XRP
articles.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has officially acknowledged the filing for a Bitwise Spot XRP Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF).

articles.title: Breaking: SEC Acknowleges Yet Another XRP ETF Filing
articles.description: Bitwise's XRP ETF filing has been acknowledged by the SEC

articles.title: Bank of New York Mellon Holds $13,280,431 Worth of Bitcoin (BTC) Exchange-Traded Funds: SEC Filing
articles.description: The Bank of New York Mellon (BK) is holding more than $13 million worth of shares in Bitcoin (BTC) exchange-traded funds (ETFs). According to a new filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Bank of New York Mellon currently holds $13,280,431 worth of shares in Bitcoin ETFs. The bank’s holdings include 115,108 shares […] The post Bank of New York Mellon Holds $13,280,431...

articles.title: Bets are in, and D.O.G.E could audit Fort Knox before May: The gold controversy
articles.description: Polymarket has opened two linked prediction markets as pressure increases on D.O.G.E. to perform an audit of Fort Knox’s gold holdings. The betting odds on D.O.G.E. auditing Fort Knox by May 2025 are 57% positive, suggesting that more individuals believe it is very likely to happen. articles.title: Charles Hoskinson On Cardano Leios Project: ‘We Know How To Build It’
articles.description: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson recently acknowledged the ongoing buzz about Ourobros Leios in the ecosystem. He said people are beginning to ask questions like “What about leios, focus on leios, can leios happen?” This suggests that netizens may be second-guessing the reality of implementing the Proof-of-Stake (PoS) protocol. articles.description: Musk’s D.O.G.E. investigates SEC inefficiencies, sparking debate as the crypto industry weighs the risks of dismantling a newly cooperative regulatory ally.

articles.title: CZ’s Crypto Comeback? Ex-Binance CEO Sparks Debate Over BNB Chain Influence
articles.description: Despite his official exit from Binance, CZ’s online activity fuels speculation over his influence on BNB Chain, sparking debate within the crypto community.

articles.title: Elon Musk’s D.O.G.E discovers $4.7T Treasury payment code hidden in budget
articles.description: A $4.7 trillion black hole in US government spending just got exposed. Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (D.O.G.E) discovered that nearly five trillion dollars in Treasury payments had been processed without a mandatory identification code today, making the money nearly impossible to track. The issue? The Treasury Access Symbol (TAS)—a required code that links […]
